title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER B — Eva solo slow-mo wonder at the magic bottle
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s slow-motion render, paired with Suno song 'Magic Bottle Whisper.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block. Slow-mo wonder choreography.
prompt: Wide slow-motion music-video shot — soft pastel-teal and pink dreamy gradient backdrop, glowing soft soap-bubbles and tiny pastel-pollen motes drifting slowly through the frame. NO real beach, NO real ocean, NO scene clutter, NO logos, NO real text. @Eva already CENTER-FRAME standing softly on a stylized creamy pastel cloud-floor with both feet planted gently, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both hands gently cupping the @magic-bottle she has lifted up to her chest, the bottle softly aglow with aqua-blue magical sparkle, the rolled paper note visible inside. Tiny twinkly sparkles drift slowly upward from the bottle. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Eva slowly turns her head with soft awe, eyes huge with magical wonder, mouth gently open in a small 'O'. The bottle rests softly cupped in both her hands at chest height, glowing softly. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva slowly raises the bottle up softly with both hands above her head, bathing her face in the soft aqua-blue glow. She closes her eyes very softly with a gentle wonder-smile. Movements are SOFT, SLOW, and DREAMY. Camera locked, head-on, kid-eye-level. Soft warm dreamy lighting. Designed to LOOP cleanly: Eva returns to identical starting pose at second 0 and second 10. No audible speech, no music — silent render. STRICT ANATOMY: Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both gently holding the bottle. NO third hand, NO fourth arm, NO floating hand. Eva stays grounded with both feet on the stylized cloud-floor throughout — no leaping, no jumping. The bottle stays whole and soft-glowing — no shattering, no broken glass.
